description: Fix all 90 pre-existing test failures across 5 suites to achieve zero-failure baseline. Root causes: source code rewritten without test updates (4 suites), selector mismatch (1 suite). Shop page suite already passes.

baselineMetrics.note: Shop page suite (31 tests) now passes - actual failures are 90 across 5 suites

successMetrics.build: npm run build passes with zero errors
successMetrics.tests: All test suites pass with 0 failures
successMetrics.lint: npm run lint passes with zero warnings

afterStory: Update prd-test-hardening.json: set story passes=true, add completedAt

stories.title: Fix ProductCard Out-of-Stock Test Selectors (2 failures)
stories.rootCause: Selector mismatch - tests query button by aria-label 'add X to cart' but out-of-stock button renders as 'Sold Out' text with no aria-label
acceptanceCriteria: Both failing tests pass: 'displays out of stock overlay' and 'disables add button when out of stock'
All 33 ProductCard tests pass (31 existing + 2 fixed)
No other test suites regress

stories.title: Fix useSellerDashboard Hook Tests (5 failures)
stories.rootCause: Hook rewritten to use FirebaseOrdersService.getAllOrders() and fetchSellerProducts() instead of SellerApi methods. Tests mock SellerApi which is no longer called.
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 useSellerDashboard tests pass with updated mocks
All 51 useSeller tests pass (46 existing + 5 fixed)
Mocks target FirebaseOrdersService and fetchSellerProducts

stories.title: Fix Cart Page Tests (6 failures)
stories.rootCause: Cart page UI restructured - order summary card layout changed, stock UI selectors stale, checkout now uses Link instead of router.push
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 failing tests pass with updated selectors
All 26 cart page tests pass (20 existing + 6 fixed)
Selectors match actual component DOM structure

stories.title: Fix Seller Dashboard Page Tests (30 failures)
stories.rootCause: Dashboard completely rewritten to use only useSellerDashboard hook. Tests mock 4 hooks (useAdminDashboard, useTopPerformingProducts, useRecentOrders, useSellerDashboard) but component only uses useSellerDashboard. Data shapes completely different.
acceptanceCriteria: All 30 failing tests pass with rewritten mocks and assertions
Total seller dashboard tests pass (may increase/decrease as tests are rewritten to match actual component)
Mocks target only useSellerDashboard with correct data shape

stories.title: Fix Seller API Tests (47 failures)
stories.rootCause: SellerApi rewritten from mock-data class to real API client using apiFetch(). Global fetch mock returns empty {} for all calls. All 47 assertions fail against empty data.
acceptanceCriteria: All 47 seller API tests pass with proper fetch mocking per endpoint
Tests verify correct URL construction, request parameters, and response handling
Error handling paths tested (network errors, 4xx, 5xx responses)

stories.title: Full Suite Validation - Zero Failures
acceptanceCriteria: npx jest --passWithNoTests exits with code 0
Test Suites: 0 failed, 253 passed
Tests: 0 failed, all passed
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes
